subcodes.first_line: O resplendent verses of the Kingdom! A beam from the manifestation of the Almighty God shone upon the sun, and it became world-illumining [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ایات باهره ملکوت پرتوی از تجلی حق قدیر بر آفتاب زد عالم تاب شد
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
